message:
test(cass): add FlexTime.UnmarshalJSON coverage

Table-driven tests covering null, RFC3339, empty string, Unix seconds,
zero, Unix milliseconds, and error cases. Boundary test for the
millisecond heuristic at 1e11. Coverage: 60.4% → 62.5%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
